title: Budget for Nomads
description: Flaggschiff-App (2022, TravelCost Native): reisebasierte Ausgaben — Budgets pro Trip, Tagesübersichten, Kategorien und Multi-Währung (z. B. Heimatwährung mit Bargeld vor Ort). Für Langzeitreisen mit schnellem Erfassen, klaren Summen und ruhigem UI.
descriptionEn: 2022 freelance flagship (TravelCost Native): trip-based travel spending—per-trip budgets, daily rollups, categorized expenses, and multi-currency support (e.g. home currency with local cash). Built for long-term travel with fast logging, clear totals, and a calm, glanceable UI.

media.altDe: Screenshot der App Budget for Nomads: Reisebudget und Ausgabenübersicht
media.altEn: Budget for Nomads app screenshot showing trip budget and spending overview

media.altDe: Budget for Nomads: Kategorien und Ausgabenliste
media.altEn: Budget for Nomads: categories and expense list

title: Portfolio (diese Website)
description: Statischer Next.js-Export, Tailwind CSS v4, Docker + Caddy auf einer Hetzner-VM. Inhalte aus JSON für Projekte und Skills.
descriptionEn: Static Next.js export, Tailwind CSS v4, Docker + Caddy on a Hetzner VM. Content-driven JSON for projects and skills.
imageAltDe: Screenshot der Portfolio-Website mit Projekten und Kontakt
imageAltEn: Portfolio website screenshot showing projects and contact section

title: Invoice Creator
description: Rechnungstool für Freelancer in Deutschland: Entwurf → Finalisieren → PDF auf Vercel Blob → E-Mail via Resend → Stripe Checkout → Erinnerungen per Cron.
descriptionEn: German freelancer–focused invoicing: drafts → finalize → PDF on Vercel Blob → email via Resend → Stripe Checkout → reminder cron jobs.

title: TripRender App
description: Mono-Repo: Expo-App mit Mapbox-WebView und AWS-Backend; GeoJSON wird per Remotion Lambda zu MP4 gerendert — Download auf Gerät oder Web.
descriptionEn: Mono-repo: Expo app with WebView Mapbox map and AWS backend that renders trip GeoJSON to MP4 via Remotion Lambda; download to device or web.
imageAltDe: Screenshot der TripRender-App mit Karte und Routenansicht
imageAltEn: TripRender app screenshot with map and route view

title: DrinkWater
description: Wasser-Tracker-MVP: Tagesziel, Gläser loggen (AsyncStorage), SVG-Fortschrittsring und wiederkehrende lokale Benachrichtigungen mit expo-notifications.
descriptionEn: Water intake MVP: daily goal, glass logging (AsyncStorage), SVG progress ring, and repeating local notifications with expo-notifications.
imageAltEn: DrinkWater app screenshot showing progress ring

title: HabitTracker
description: Plattformübergreifendes Gewohnheits-Tracking mit Charts (react-native-chart-kit), Expo Router, Reanimated und EAS-Dev-Builds.
descriptionEn: Cross-platform habit tracking with charts (react-native-chart-kit), Expo Router, Reanimated, and EAS dev builds.

title: SwipeStocks
description: Expo-Finanz-App mit Firebase, Zustand, React Native Paper, Gesten + Reanimated-Stacks, MMKV sowie Jest/Testing Library.
descriptionEn: Expo finance-style app with Firebase, Zustand, React Native Paper, gesture + reanimated stacks, MMKV, and Jest/Testing Library.
imageAltEn: SwipeStocks app screenshot with card-based UI

title: TripRender (Mapbox-Route SPA)
description: Single-Page-Routenplanung: Ort A nach B auf einer Mapbox-Karte; statischer Build mit Token-Injection, deploybar auf GitHub Pages oder Netlify.
descriptionEn: Single-page driving directions: place A to B on a Mapbox map; static build with token injection, deployable to GitHub Pages or Netlify.

title: ControlMe
description: Multi-Tenant-SaaS-Vorlage: Next.js App Router, Supabase, Billing (Stripe/Lemon Squeezy), i18n, Feature-Packages in Turborepo; Playwright E2E.
descriptionEn: Multi-tenant SaaS template: Next.js App Router, Supabase, billing (Stripe/Lemon Squeezy), i18n, feature packages in a Turborepo; Playwright E2E.

title: Ondojo
description: Große Expo-App auf AWS Amplify: AppSync/GraphQL, viele Lambda-Funktionen, EAS-CI für TestFlight/Production, Jest + Maestro E2E, Analytics.
descriptionEn: Large Expo app on AWS Amplify: AppSync/GraphQL, many Lambda functions, EAS CI for TestFlight/production, Jest + Maestro E2E, analytics integrations.

title: Mobile Battlegrounds
description: Mobiles Kartenspiel: React Native (Expo), Firebase Auth & Firestore, Cloud Functions, Zustand-State.
descriptionEn: Mobile card battle game: React Native (Expo), Firebase Auth & Firestore, Cloud Functions, Zustand state.

title: StreamApp
description: Twitch-inspiriertes Expo-MVP: Stream-Feed, Kategorien und natives Video mit Expo Video und React Navigation.
descriptionEn: Twitch-inspired Expo MVP: stream feed, categories, and native video playback with Expo Video and React Navigation.
